title: entandrophragma candollei
intro: Entandrophragma candollei, also known as the yellow fever tree, is a species of deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of central Africa. The bark and seeds of the plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Entandrophragma candollei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal preparations to create remedies for various health issues.
